children.name: RBAC: Administration is hidden for Stand
children.characters: RBAC: Administration is hidden for Standard Users (server also rejects with 403).

children.name:
original posts and generated
    materia
children.characters: original posts and generated materials [§1.3] · SLO < 500 ms [OPERATOR §Q14]

children.name: Query is never required — empty shows re
children.characters: Query is never required — empty shows recent searches. Press

children.name: "…retrieval-augmented generation grounds
children.characters: "…retrieval-augmented generation grounds an LLM in external evidence…"

children.name: "dense retrieval beats BM25 when the cor
children.characters: "dense retrieval beats BM25 when the corpus…"

children.name: Vectors are reference-only: ANN returns
children.characters: Vectors are reference-only: ANN returns ids + scores; rows hydrate from PostgreSQL, the system of record [§2.1.1]. Each score is exposed to screen readers as “relevance 0.94”.

children.name: Empty query = recent searches + suggeste
children.characters: Empty query = recent searches + suggested filters; query is never required.

children.name: Result-list skeleton while the embedder
children.characters: Result-list skeleton while the embedder + ANN run; static under reduced-motion.

children.name: Clear-filters affordance when filters ex
children.characters: Clear-filters affordance when filters exclude everything.

children.name: Search took too long — try narrowing you
children.characters: Search took too long — try narrowing your query

children.name: Graceful nudge, never a spinner that han
children.characters: Graceful nudge, never a spinner that hangs.

children.name: ⚠ scores are not semantic on this deploy
children.characters: ⚠ scores are not semantic on this deployment

children.name: [GAP: 2.1] --warn banner; the score colu
children.characters: [GAP: 2.1] --warn banner; the score column is hidden. Requires HELIX_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=llama.

children.name: Checkbox group enforces ≥ 1 scope on sub
children.characters: Checkbox group enforces ≥ 1 scope on submit.

children.characters: Helix Development attribution is locked — it persists under any white-label.
